purpose: Source-of-truth baseline for planned provider upgrades: Jupiter Pro (yearly) and Helius Business, plus RogueZero capacity implications.

jupiterProYearly.notes: Portal pricing card shown in chat attachment.

runtimeLimiterDefaults.notes: Code defaults now equal the real 90%-of-cap fleet ceilings (Jupiter 150->135, Helius RPC 200->180, Helius Sender 50->45). Buckets are DB-backed and shared fleet-wide across worker + API by key.

runtimeSpeedProfiles.capacityModel: concurrentCapacity = floor(base / capacityDivisor); glide /4, pulse /2, surge /1

truth: Code defaults now consume the real provider headroom: Jupiter 135 RPS and Helius 180 RPS (90% of plan caps), shared fleet-wide.
The worker auto-shift loop (Surge/Pulse/Glide) keeps combined fleet load under 90% of every lane by watching worst-lane pressure and shifting cadence/capacity.
Measured per-trade call accounting shows Helius RPC is the binding lane, not Jupiter (see callAccounting).

safeTargetsUsing90PercentCapRule.rule: Fleet operates at 90% of documented provider ceiling (10% safety headroom).

perEntryTradeBeforeOptimization.detail: 1 build : 2 ALT loads + 1 simulate + 1 priority-fee + 1 blockheight + 2 balance

perEntryTradeAfterOptimization.levers: ALT caching (-2 RPC), subscription-backed balance (-2 RPC)

upgradeOnlyWithoutEnvChanges.netCapacityChange: code defaults now equal the 90% fleet caps; no env override required

upgradeWithEnvAlignment.note: These numbers reflect the real 90%-of-cap fleet ceilings and match the code defaults.

sessionCeilingModel.assumption: Measured (not assumed): one entry trade costs ~1 Jupiter request and ~7 Helius RPC requests before optimization (~3 after ALT caching + subscription balance). Helius RPC, not Jupiter, is the binding lane. See capacityImpact.callAccounting.
sessionCeilingModel.practicalRead: Provider-based ceilings sit above RogueZero's per-mode concurrency caps (glide 87, pulse 175, surge 350). The worker auto-shift loop keeps the fleet under 90% of the binding lane (Helius RPC) by stepping the mode down under pressure and back up on recovery.

bottomLine.heliusBusinessGivesYou: 200 RPC RPS, 50 sendTransaction/sec, 5 sendBundle/sec, 50 DAS RPS, and 100M credits/month.
bottomLine.forRogueZeroRightNow: Code defaults equal the real 90% fleet caps: Jupiter 135 RPS, Helius 180 RPS, Helius Sender 45 TPS, 350 base concurrent capacity. The worker auto-manages Surge/Pulse/Glide; admin can pin a mode or return to auto.
